name: recsys-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM RecSys submissions: venue fit against SIGIR/KDD/WSDM/TheWebConf, anonymous ACM two-column submission checks, rebuttal drafting, offline-and-online evaluation rigor, off-policy evaluation, the RecSys Reproducibility track and reproducibility-crisis debates, anonymous code/data artifacts, ACM camera-ready, and project workflow. Grounded in the official RecSys 2026 Call for Contributions, recsys.acm.org cycle pages, ACM Digital Library proceedings, and dblp, checked on 2026-07-09.
